query: /database-architect optimize These queries are slow on our orders table: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at > now() - interval '7 days'
expected_behavior: Agent runs index-recommender.py with the query and schema context
Agent reads references/query-optimization.md for optimization patterns
Agent suggests a composite index on (status, created_at) with rationale for column order based on selectivity
Agent analyzes the query execution pattern (range scan with equality filter)
Agent discusses whether a partial index on status = 'pending' would be beneficial given cardinality
Agent includes write overhead trade-off for the recommended index
Agent presents estimated impact (high/medium/low) for each recommendation
